name: Nilai Persediaan - Filter Gudang, Filter Kategori, Lihat Total Nilai
description: Test laporan nilai persediaan: filter gudang, filter kategori, lihat total nilai stok. Login admin.

planSteps.description: Navigate to /login, fill email admin@inventory.com and password password, click login
Click Nilai Persediaan menu in the sidebar
Nilai Persediaan page is visible showing stock valuation report with total values
Select a warehouse from the Semua Gudang dropdown filter
Report is filtered by selected warehouse
Select a category from the Semua Kategori dropdown filter
Report is filtered by selected category
